au.updateNote: Still current at:11 July 2026 Updated:02 July 2026 Latest update:We continue to advise exercise a high degree of caution in South Africa. Crime and violence are serious issues across South Africa. Protests and large gatherings can occur anywhere and could become violent at short notice. Anti-immigration marches and protests may continue. Avoid areas affected by protests or large public gatherings.
